headlines.title: ‘Between pain and fear’: Gaza children bear cost of ongoing Israeli attacks
headlines.snippet: Children in Gaza are suffering immensely from ongoing Israeli attacks, despite a 'ceasefire' announced in October 2025. The attacks continue to have a severe impact on their well-being.

headlines.title: Polls open in New Caledonia’s first provincial elections since 2019
headlines.snippet: New Caledonia is holding its first provincial elections since 2019, with approximately 2,500 police officers deployed to ensure security at polling stations. The election is being closely monitored.

headlines.title: In pictures: Race against time to rescue Venezuela earthquake survivors
headlines.snippet: Search and rescue efforts are underway in Venezuela following a devastating earthquake. Experts emphasize the critical 72-hour window for finding survivors, highlighting the urgency of the situation.

headlines.title: Iran war day 121: Iran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait as US strikes near Hormuz
headlines.snippet: Iran has attacked Bahrain and Kuwait, while the US has conducted strikes near the Strait of Hormuz. This escalation marks day 121 of ongoing conflict in the region.

headlines.title: Venezuelan earthquake death toll rises amid increasingly dire search
headlines.snippet: The death toll from twin earthquakes in Venezuela has risen to 1,430, with an estimated 51,000 people still missing. Search efforts are intensifying amid dire conditions.

headlines.title: Residential building damaged in Iranian strike, says Bahrain ministry
headlines.snippet: A residential building in Bahrain's Muharraq Governorate was damaged in an Iranian strike, according to the nation's Ministry of Interior. No casualties were reported, and authorities are investigating the incident.

headlines.title: Morning update
headlines.snippet: The United States conducted a second consecutive day of strikes on Iranian military targets near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran's Revolutionary Guard claimed responsibility for retaliatory drone and missile attacks.

headlines.title: Palestinian injured by Israeli fire in Jerusalem camp, 13 detained during raids
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces shot and wounded a Palestinian youth and detained two others in the Qalandia refugee camp near Jerusalem. Eleven additional Palestinians were detained during raids in the occupied West Bank.

headlines.title: Israel says troops killed armed fighters in southern Syria and Lebanon
headlines.snippet: The Israeli military announced that its forces killed several armed individuals in southern Syria and conducted strikes against Hezbollah-linked targets in southern Lebanon. These operations aim to address threats to Israeli civilians and troops.

headlines.title: Iran's Aragchi to 'discuss regional developments' with Iraqi officials
headlines.snippet: Iranian foreign minister Abbas Aragchi has traveled to Baghdad for an official visit to discuss bilateral relations and regional developments with Iraqi officials. This visit occurs amidst recent US strikes on Iranian installations and retaliatory attacks by Iran.
